createAccount.title: Create Your Restaurant Account
createAccount.description: Set up your digital storefront in minutes. Upload your menu, define pricing, add food images, and start receiving orders instantly through our fully automated onboarding flow.

realTimeOrders.title: Manage Orders in Real-Time
realTimeOrders.description: Track new orders, accepted orders, rider assignments, and delivery progress — all updated live. Everything stays synchronized across devices.

support.title: 24/7 Support for Restaurants
support.description: Get priority assistance at any time. From technical help to menu optimization, our support team ensures your operations run smoothly.

sectionSix.description: Our platform empowers restaurants to operate smarter, serve faster, and scale effortlessly. Designed with advanced automation and real-time insights, we help food businesses stay ahead in a competitive delivery market.

checklist.orderFlow: Seamless order flow from customers to your kitchen
checklist.menuControls: Smart menu, pricing, and inventory controls

allOrderTypes.question: Can I use the platform for both dine-in and delivery orders?
allOrderTypes.answer: Yes, our system supports all order types — delivery, takeaway, and dine-in. Restaurants can easily manage them through a single dashboard designed for speed and efficiency.

updateMenu.question: How do I update my restaurant menu?
updateMenu.answer: You can update your menu directly from the restaurant dashboard. Add or remove items, update prices, manage variations, and control availability in real time without any technical assistance.

deliveryRiders.question: Do you provide delivery riders?
deliveryRiders.answer: We support both in-house and third-party delivery models. Restaurants can use their own riders or integrate with supported delivery partners depending on their business needs.

joiningFees.question: Are there any fees for joining the platform?
joiningFees.answer: There are no upfront setup fees. Pricing depends on your selected plan and order volume. Full details are available during onboarding or by contacting our sales team.

multipleDevices.question: Can I manage orders from multiple devices?
multipleDevices.answer: Yes. Your account stays synchronized across all devices, allowing you to manage orders, menus, and analytics from multiple tablets, phones, or desktops simultaneously.

sectionNine.descriptionLineOne: Take full control of your restaurant operations from anywhere.
sectionNine.descriptionLineTwo: Accept orders, update menus, track deliveries, and monitor performance — all
sectionNine.descriptionLineThree: through our powerful, easy-to-use mobile app.
sectionNine.descriptionLineFour: Enjoy real-time notifications, faster workflows, and a seamless
sectionNine.descriptionLineFive: management experience designed for busy restaurant teams.

hero.description: We're building the infrastructure that allows restaurants of all sizes to thrive in a digital-first world. From small cafes to global franchises, we provide the tools to manage every detail seamlessly.

journey.title: Our Journey
journey.description: From a small startup in a garage to a global leader in restaurant technology. Here’s how we got here.

founded.title: Founded with Vision
founded.description: Our founders identified the friction between kitchen operations and digital ordering systems.

pivot.title: The Great Pivot
pivot.description: During the global pandemic, we helped over 10,000 restaurants transition to digital-only formats overnight.

globalExpansion.title: Global Expansion
globalExpansion.description: Opened offices in London, Singapore, and New York to better serve our growing international client base.

posIntegration.title: POS Integration
posIntegration.description: Connect your existing hardware seamlessly. Sync orders, payments, and kitchen displays in real-time for zero friction service.

builtForChefs.title: Built by Chefs, for Chefs.
builtForChefs.description: We understand the heat of the kitchen. That's why we've designed our interface to be lightning-fast, highly visible, and incredibly simple to use—even during the busiest dinner rushes.

requestDemo.title: Custom Enterprise Solutions
requestDemo.description: Running a restaurant group or a national chain? We provide tailored workflows, multi-location consolidation, and advanced reporting tools designed to scale with your business growth.

hero.description: Simple, predictable pricing designed to scale with your restaurant. Choose the plan that fits your kitchen's needs.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for single locations and small cafes.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom solutions for large chains and franchises.

comparison.title: Detailed Feature Comparison
comparison.description: Everything you need to know about our capabilities.

switchPlans.question: Can I switch plans later?
switchPlans.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, new features become available immediately. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

existingHardware.question: Does Gusto work with my existing hardware?
existingHardware.answer: Gusto is hardware-agnostic. We support most modern POS terminals, iPads, and Android tablets. Contact our team to verify your specific setup.

supportIncluded.question: What kind of support is included?
supportIncluded.answer: Starter plans include email support. Professional and Enterprise plans include 24/7 priority phone and chat support with guaranteed response times under 30 minutes.

hiddenFees.question: Are there any hidden setup fees?
hiddenFees.answer: No. We believe in transparent pricing. There are no mandatory implementation fees. Custom onboarding is available for Enterprise teams if needed.

hero.description: Need help managing your restaurant or interested in our enterprise solutions? Our team is available 24/7 to assist you.

delivery.title: Order & Delivery Area Settings
delivery.description: Configure customer-facing delivery charges, radius, polygon zones, radius bands, or postal-code based delivery rules.

radius.label: Radius
radius.description: Use straight-line distance from the branch location.

zone.label: Polygon zones
zone.description: Draw multiple delivery areas directly on Google Maps.

zoneBands.label: Distance bands
zoneBands.description: Use distance slabs with separate fees and thresholds.

postalCode.label: Postal codes
postalCode.description: Charge delivery by one or more postal-code rules.

map.radiusDescription: Preview the straight-line delivery radius from branch latitude/longitude.
map.zoneDescription: Search an area first, generate a starter zone, then fine-tune points by dragging markers.
map.searchPlaceholder: Search area, street, city, or landmark
map.clickDragHelp: Click map to add · drag markers to adjust
map.enableMapHelp: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in env to enable map selection.
map.radiusFooter: Branch location comes from the address latitude/longitude above.

radiusBands.title: Radius Fee Bands
radiusBands.description: Optional distance bands for radius-based delivery. Use decimal values like 2.5 or 7.5 km.
radiusBands.empty: No radius fee band configured. The base delivery fee will be used for the configured radius.

zones.title: Polygon Delivery Zones
zones.description: Add multiple zones. Search the area and use starter-zone generation for faster point selection.
zones.empty: No delivery zone configured yet. Search an area and generate a starter zone, or click the map to start drawing one.
zones.noPoints: No points yet. Select this zone and click on the map, add center point, or generate a starter zone.

postalRules.title: Postal Code Rules
postalRules.description: Add postal codes with delivery fee, minimum order, and free-delivery threshold.
postalRules.empty: No postal code rule configured yet.
